text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: Now everyone will know how amazing you are!
Now everyone will know how amazing you are!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: Now everyone will know how amazing you are!
Now everyone will know how amazing you are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To encourage Narita Taishin, I say that if she
keeps winning, it'll be impossible for people not
to be impressed by her. But...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, you just ruined the moment. Thanks a lot.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I cringed so hard when I saw you grinning like a
fool.
choice_data_list: You won! Of course I'm going to be happy!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna get changed and head back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin sounds fed up with me, but I can
discern a little spring in her step as she goes off.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm not weak! I'm the fastest of all of them!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What's with that creepy smirk? Knock it off.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Good for you. Doesn't matter to me if you're
happy or not, though.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I win these races for myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she makes that declaration, I'm struck once
again by her determination to win.
